zh.Northumberland, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair於1457年1月19日出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Sir John Blair of that Ilk19歲，母親Lady Marion MacMorran18歲。他於1474年與Lady Beatrice Morton在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年56歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾。

zh-hans.Northumberland, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair于1457年1月19日出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾时，他的父亲Sir John Blair of that Ilk19岁，母亲Lady Marion MacMorran18岁。他于1474年与Lady Beatrice Morton在英国苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德享年56岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Blair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places in Scotland called Blair, named with Scottish Gaelic blàr (genitive blàir) ‘plain, field’, especially a battlefield (Irish blár). There were families of this name in the Middle Ages taking their names from any of the places called Blair in Dysart parish Fife, Dalry parish Ayrshire, and Blairgowrie in Perthshire.
Americanized form of French   Belair   and   Blais  .

variants.name: Belair
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Lucien, Aime, Auguste, Aurele, Carmelle, Normand, Raoul, Rolande.

French (also Bélair): habitational name from Belair, Bélair or (Le) Bel-Air, names of several places in various parts of France, meaning literally ‘beautiful place’. Compare Belaire , Bellair , Bellaire , and Blair .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair was born on 19 January 1457, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, was 19 and his mother, Lady Marion MacMorran, was 18. He married Lady Beatrice Morton in 1474, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 September 1513, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair est né le 19 janvier 1457, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Marion MacMorran, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Lady Beatrice Morton en 1474, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair am 19. Januar 1457 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Blair of that Ilk 19 und seine Mutter Lady Marion MacMorran 18. Er hat 1474 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Beatrice Morton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair è nato il il 19 gennaio 1457 nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Lady Marion MacMorran, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Lady Beatrice Morton nel 1474, nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blairが1457年1月19日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Blair of that Ilkは19歳，母Lady Marion MacMorranは18歳であった。1474年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアでLady Beatrice Mortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで56歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair(이)가 1457년 1월 19일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Blair of that Ilk(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Marion MacMorran(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1474년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 Lady Beatrice Morton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르에 묻혔다.

pt.19 January 1457–9 September 1513: 19 de janeiro de 1457–9 de setembro de 1513
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair nasceu em 19 de janeiro de 1457, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marion MacMorran, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Beatrice Morton em 1474, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair родился 19 января 1457 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Blair of that Ilk было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marion MacMorran, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Beatrice Morton в 1474 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности аиршир, Шотландия.

es.19 January 1457–9 September 1513: 19 de enero de 1457–9 de septiembre de 1513
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 8th Lord of Blair nació el 19 de enero de 1457, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Blair of that Ilk, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Marion MacMorran, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Lady Beatrice Morton en 1474, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Ayrshire, Scotland.
